summary: A well-presented double bedroom in a modern apartment, decorated in neutral magnolia/off-white emulsion with grey carpeting throughout. The room is generally clean and in good decorative order, furnished with a double divan bed, button-upholstered headboard, bedside cabinets, table lamps and a roller blind to the window. A number of minor defects are noted including light scuff/pencil-type marks to walls, a brown spot mark above the headboard, a stain mark to the mattress border, soiling to chrome switch/socket faceplates, and a soiled headboard. An Amazon Basics oil-filled electric radiator is present as supplementary heating. The window overlooks an active construction site.

items.name: Ceiling
items.description: Smooth plastered and emulsioned ceiling in white, with recessed downlights and a linear ventilation grille to upper wall/ceiling junction.

items.name: Walls
items.description: Emulsioned plastered walls in off-white/magnolia tone.
defects: Faint pencil-type scuff marks to wall (P045)
Light scuff/scratch marks to wall above skirting (P046)
Brown spot mark to wall approx above headboard (P048)
Light marks to wall above headboard (P049)

items.name: Skirting boards
items.description: Painted timber skirting boards in white, profiled.

items.name: Flooring
items.description: Grey fitted cut-pile carpet throughout, with adjoining oak-effect laminate flooring visible to corridor beyond door.

items.name: Internal door
items.description: Flush internal door in white with lever handle on chrome/satin furniture and chrome hinges.

items.name: Window
items.description: Double-glazed window with white frame and dark grey internal trim, with handle, overlooking construction site.

items.name: Roller blind
items.description: Beige/grey fabric roller blind with chain-pull mechanism to window.

items.name: Ventilation grille
items.description: Linear white ventilation/air-conditioning grille to upper wall.

items.name: Light switch (single, black nickel)
items.description: Single black nickel/smoked chrome flat-plate light switch.

items.name: Light switch (double, black nickel)
items.description: Twin/double black nickel flat-plate light switch.

items.name: Switch & control panel (black nickel)
items.description: Black nickel flat-plate fused switch alongside a black control/thermostat touch panel.

items.name: Double socket outlets (black nickel)
items.description: Black nickel/smoked chrome flat-plate switched double socket outlets.

items.name: Double divan bed with mattress
items.description: Double divan base in dark grey/charcoal upholstered fabric with chrome corner trim, fitted with 'Manor' branded sprung mattress, white damask-effect ticking with feather/leaf pattern.
defects: Dark spot/stain mark to mattress border, approx central (P040)
Light shadow marks to mattress top (P038, P039)

items.name: Upholstered headboard
items.description: Tall buttoned/Chesterfield-style headboard in dark grey/charcoal fabric.
defects: Light soiling to top edge of headboard (P049)

items.name: Bedside chests of drawers
items.description: White two/three-drawer bedside chests with geometric diamond-textured drawer fronts, brass-tone handles and gold-finish hairpin legs.
defects: Minor manufacturer label/barcode present to drawer interior (P041, P042)

items.name: Bedside table lamps
items.description: Pair of table lamps with black metal stem bases and square/tapered cream fabric shades.

items.name: Oil-filled electric radiator
items.description: Amazon Basics portable oil-filled column radiator/heater in black with control panel.
